metadata.description: Generic skills for better decisions: structured analytic techniques, decision analysis, modeling & simulation, and data analysis.

plugins.name: decision-analytics-toolkit
plugins.description: Four general-purpose skills for individuals and small teams: structured analytic techniques (ACH, premortem, key assumptions, red team), decision analysis (weighted scoring, decision trees, expected value), modeling & simulation (Monte Carlo, sensitivity, forecasting), and data analysis (EDA, hypothesis testing, regression).
